# Invoke-FinOpsTriage

## SYNOPSIS

Builds advisory triage JSON/CSV artefacts from an existing report JSON.

## SYNTAX

### __AllParameterSets

```
Invoke-FinOpsTriage [-InputReport] <string> [[-OutputDirectory] <string>] [[-Format] <string>]
 [<CommonParameters>]
```

## ALIASES

This cmdlet has the following aliases,
  {{Insert list of aliases}}

## DESCRIPTION

Native port of the Python ``finops-assess triage`` subcommand.
Reads an existing finops-assess report file and emits deterministic,
read-only advisory triage artefacts.

## EXAMPLES

### EXAMPLE 1

Invoke-FinOpsTriage -InputReport ./report.json -OutputDirectory ./triage -Format both

Reads report.json and writes deterministic advisory triage artefacts:
./triage/triage.json and ./triage/triage.csv.

## PARAMETERS

### -Format

Artefact format to write: ``json``, ``csv``, or ``both``.
